author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for src/memdir/ subsystem implementing background memory agents (autoDream consolidation, MagicDocs auto-docs, SessionMemory per-session notes, PromptSuggestion speculative next-prompt). Not addressable in a cleanup pass: multi-day feature reading CC memdir/ TS source plus session-lifecycle integration, ~/.claude/projects/X/Y/session-memory/summary.md writer, forked subagent with tool-denial callback for cache-safe speculation. Phase 1 spec captured in #533. Multiple downstream Phase 2 issues (#632/#633/#634/#635) carry the implementable subparts.
